title: Leslie Bibb and Alex Edelman Style Tailored Blazers With Shorts and Sneakers In Playful Brooks Brothers Campaign
content:
Brooks Brothersis hoping a trip to “The White Lotus” will give women more of a reason to shop the legendary fashion brand.

Leslie Bibb, who starred in the latest season of the hit HBO series, now fronts a new ad campaign forBrooks Brothers,out today. Officially titled “Make It Yours,” Bibb is featured in different photos wearing a wide range of looks, including maxi skirts, argyle-knit sweaters, playfully patterned neck ties and sharply tailored blazers.

“I love Leslie Bibb,” Brooks Brothers CEO Ken Ohashi tellsVariety. “I think she’s so chic and so fashionable. Yet, she’s so classic, and she has such great energy. We really thought she was perfect for our campaign.”

“Our women’s business is still small,” he continues. “It’s like 12% of our business, but one in three Brooks Brothers shoppers are actually women, and so we just know we have a big opportunity to just kind of showcase that.”

Throughout the campaign imagery, Bibb wears theSupima Trench Coat,Traditional Fit Wool Blazer,andArchive Tennis Sweater,among dozens of other luxe pieces. Shop through all the pieces featured in the campaignhere.

At more than 200 years old, Brooks Brothers is the oldest retailer in the U.S. It’s been worn by presidents, including Abraham Lincoln, JFK and Barak Obama, as well A-list celebrities like Leonardo DiCaprio and Lady Gaga.

Another Hollywood face in the new campaign is comedian and writerAlex Edelman. “I met Alex, and he was like, ‘I got my Bar Mitzvah suit at Bruce Brothers’ and I just thought he was so funny,” Ohashi says. “But then he was like, ‘I didn’t know you had modernized and all that.’ I was like, ‘Go to the store.’”

Edelman visited Brooks Brothers’ new 10,000 square-foot flagship in New York City’s Financial District.  “He wrote me, saying, ‘Oh my god, I love this place. I love the product,’” Ohashi recalls. “That was about a year ago so when were thinking about the campaign, I was like, ‘Why don’t we have Alex?’”

Shot by photographer Coliena Rentmeester, the campaign also includes creator and fashion influencer TyLynn Nguyen; influencer Nick Wooster; model, entrepreneur and athlete Nick Arrington; and advocate, model and director Bethann Hardison.

Brooks Brothers once had a store on Rodeo Drive, but closed in 2018. It has since moved to the Beverly Center. Ohashi says he’s currently “gunning” for a spot in Orange County. “We’ve been looking at L.A. but we lost the Orange County store so that’s probably the next one I’m going to open [in the Los Angeles area],” he said. “We need to get back into like Fashion Island or we’re looking at Costa Mesa as well.”
title_zh: 萊斯莉·比布(Leslie Bibb)和亞歷克斯·艾德曼(Alex Edelman)在布魯克斯兄弟(Brooks Brothers)的趣味廣告中，搭配剪裁合身的西裝外套、短褲和運動鞋。
content_zh:
Brooks Brothers希望透過《白蓮花(The White Lotus)》的旅程，讓女性有更多理由購物這個傳奇的時尚品牌。

在最新一季的熱門HBO系列中主演的萊斯莉·比布(Leslie Bibb)，現在為Brooks Brothers推出了一個新的廣告活動，名為“Make It Yours”。比布在不同的照片中展示了多種造型，包括長裙、菱格紋毛衣、趣味圖案的領帶和剪裁精緻的西裝外套。

“我非常喜歡萊斯莉·比布，”Brooks Brothers的首席執行官大橋健(Ken Ohashi)告訴《綜藝(Variety)》。 “我覺得她非常時尚且有品味。然而，她又是如此經典，並且擁有很好的能量。我們認為她非常適合我們的廣告活動。”

“我們的女性業務仍然很小，”他繼續說。“這大約占我們業務的12%，但每三位Brooks Brothers的顧客中就有一位是女性，因此我們知道我們有很大的機會來展示這一點。”

在廣告活動的影像中，比布穿著Supima風衣、傳統合身羊毛西裝外套和檔案網球毛衣等數十件奢華單品。可以在這裡查看廣告中展示的所有單品。

Brooks Brothers成立超過200年，是美國最古老的零售商。它曾被包括亞伯拉罕·林肯、甘迺迪(JFK)和巴拉克·奧巴馬在內的總統，以及如萊昂納多·迪卡普里奧和女神卡卡(Lady Gaga)等A-list名人穿著。

新廣告中的另一位好萊塢面孔是喜劇演員兼作家亞歷克斯·艾德爾曼(Alex Edelman)。大橋健說：“我遇到了亞歷克斯，他說，‘我在Brooks Brothers買了我的巴爾米茲瓦西裝’，我覺得他非常有趣。”他接著說：“但後來他又說，‘我不知道你們已經現代化了這一切。’我就說，‘去商店看看吧。’”

艾德爾曼參觀了Brooks Brothers位於紐約市金融區的新旗艦店，面積達10,000平方英尺。“他給我寫信說，‘哦我的天，我愛這個地方。我愛這個產品，’”大橋健回憶道。“那大約是一年前的事，所以當我們在考慮這個廣告活動時，我想，‘為什麼不讓亞歷克斯參加呢？’”

這個廣告活動由攝影師科莉娜·倫特米斯特(Coliena Rentmeester)拍攝，還包括創作者兼時尚影響者泰琳·阮(TyLynn Nguyen)、影響者尼克·伍斯特(Nick Wooster)、模特、企業家和運動員尼克·阿林頓(Nick Arrington)，以及倡導者、模特和導演貝瑟安·哈迪森(Bethann Hardison)。

Brooks Brothers曾在羅迪歐大道(Rodeo Drive)開設過一家店，但在2018年關閉。此後它已搬遷至比佛利中心(Beverly Center)。大橋健表示，他目前正在“全力以赴”尋找在橙縣的店面。“我們一直在考慮洛杉磯，但我們失去了橙縣的店，所以這可能是我在洛杉磯地區要開的下一家店，”他說。“我們需要回到時尚島(Fashion Island)，或者我們也在考慮科斯塔梅薩(Costa Mesa)。”
summary_zh:
Brooks Brothers希望透過《白蓮花(The White Lotus)》的旅程，讓女性有更多理由購物這個傳奇的時尚品牌。

在最新一季的熱門HBO系列中主演的萊斯莉·比布(Leslie Bibb)，現在為Brooks Brothers推出了一個新的廣告活動，名為“Make It Yours”。比布在不同的照片中展示了多種造型，包括長裙、菱格紋毛衣、趣味圖案的領帶和剪裁精緻的西裝外套。
